text: I feel the subtle hum of anticipation as I stand before these glass doors. There is an odd serenity in the clean lines, the indirect light, and the distant blue glow. Through the transparent barrier, I glimpse a space dedicated to R&D—possibility and curiosity seem to saturate the air, yet there's a tension, too, a liminality to standing on this threshold. My philosophical mind wonders what awaits on the other side—what truths, what technologies, what questions.
